title: Dr. Bunmi Agagu Adu Inducted into Chartered Institute of Directors, Nigeria - FinancialEDGE
description: Eterna Plc proudly celebrates the investiture of Dr. Bunmi Agagu Adu, Managing Director, Eterna Industries Limited, as a distinguished member of The Chartered Institute of Directors, Nigeria (CIoD). html:
Eterna Plc proudly celebrates the investiture of Dr. Bunmi Agagu Adu, Managing Director, Eterna Industries Limited, as a distinguished member of The Chartered Institute of Directors, Nigeria (CIoD).

This milestone is especially significant for us in the lubricants business. Under her leadership at Eterna Industries Limited, the home of our blending operations and lubricant innovation, Dr. Agagu Adu has championed transformation, strengthened product quality and standards, and driven a culture of operational excellence that continues to elevate our position in the market.

Her induction into CIoD reflects not only her commitment to ethical leadership and strategic governance but also her passion for shaping a dynamic, competitive, and future-ready lubricants sector in Nigeria.

This achievement is a proud moment for all of us at Eterna, reinforcing our confidence in the growth trajectory of our lubricants business and the impact we are making in the energy ecosystem.

Congratulations, Dr. Agagu Adu
We celebrate your leadership, your vision, and your dedication to building a stronger, more innovative Eterna.
